You need JavaScript enabled to view it. : Detailed Profile Education and Qualification: PhD Work Experience: S.No. Designation Institute Year 1 Professor SGSITS Indore 2018 to till date 2 Associate Professor SGSITS Indore 2015 to 2018 3 Assistant Professor SGSITS Indore 2001 to 2015 Research Details: Research Area: (i)Microstrip patch antennas designs for wireless communication for 4G, 5G, and THz spectrums. (ii)Ultra wideband antenna (UWB), (iii)Substrate integrated waveguide (SIW) antennas, (iv)High speed/ Vehicular communication antennas, (v)Millimeter wave communication antennas PhD Supervision: List of PhD Scholars Sr. No. Name of Research Scholar Research Area University Registration Year 1 Mohit Pant 5G MIMO Antenna Design RGPV 2019 2 Rashmi Pant THz Communication RGPV 2019 3 Megha Soni 5G MIMO Antenna Design Amity University Gwalior 2019 4 Mantar Singh Mandloi 5G MIMO Antenna Design RGPV 2020 5 Sneha Moghe 5G & THz Antenna Design RGPV 2020 6 Rohit Yadav 5G & THz Antenna Design DAVV 2021 7 M.L.
